hero.title: Hi, I'm Alex. I study the
hero.subtitle: of our universe.
hero.paragraph: Astrophysics research student at Global Space University, dedicated to computational modeling of dark matter and early galaxy formation.

intro: Ever since looking through a hand-me-down telescope at age nine, the silence of the stars has been my favorite puzzle.
My research aims to bridge the gap between theoretical predictions and observational datasets.

timeline.title: PhD in Astrophysics (Candidate)
timeline.desc: Developing Bayesian inference pipelines for dark matter substructures.

timeline.title: MSc in Physics & Astronomy
timeline.desc: Graduated with distinction and specialized in cosmology.

timeline.title: Research Fellow
timeline.desc: Collaborated with the data science team on supernova detection.

timeline.title: BSc in Mathematical Physics
timeline.desc: Focused on quantum mechanics and relativity.

goals.title: PhD Goals & Aspirations
goals.desc: My ultimate goal is to contribute to the Cosmological Standard Model by providing empirical evidence for the nature of dark matter.

cta.title: Want to see my recent publications?
cta.desc: Check out the technical portfolio including active projects.
